productDisplayName: Converse Men Black and Blue Shoes
description: Style NoteDedicated to basketball champ Chuck Taylor, the Chuck Taylor All-Star series from converse are known as Chucks and come in classic designs. Created using canvas and rubber, this range of sneakers from Converse were initially designed to capture the basketball market, but soon enough turned into hot casual footwear favourites.Product DetailsBlack canvas shoe with blue checksCanvas upper for easy maintenance and durabilityLong canvas tongue for added comfort and snug FitSynthetic twill lace running through metallic eyelets for durability and snug fitCushioned fabric footbed for comfort and breathabilityReinforced guard to protect the forefoot of the shoe and enhance durabilityVulcanized rubber outsole for flexibility and tractionWaffle pattern outsole for superior grip on all terrainsMaterial and CareCanvasWipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
